refined_caption: A child is being served hospital food that appears to be contaminated. The food is being served in an unconventional setting, in front of a car.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see a child being served what looked like contaminated food at the hospital. The food was being handed out in a setting that didn't seem very sanitary, right in front of a car. This is completely unacceptable and I'm worried about the health and safety of the patients.
voice_text: I just saw a kid being given contaminated hospital food, it's disgusting. They're serving it right in front of a car, what kind of hygiene is that?
